=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (11:18-11:35) TS377037: Using Schema.decodeSync inside an Effect generator is not recommended. Use Schema.decodeEffect instead to get properly typed error channel. effect(schemaSyncInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable schemaSyncInEffect for this line"
